title: Nebris
description: Makes the Moon, Sun, and Snowflakes more realistic
body:
![image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_a18aae5e-41d6-40dc-aa44-297f81d2b93e.png)

**🌙☀❄ Enhances the Moon, Sun, and Snowflakes with greater realism:**  
- All Moon phases improved  
- The Sun depicted as in our world  
- Snowflakes more varied and detailed  

---

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/XlLHV8vrHI0" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

---

<details>
<summary>📸 Preview</summary>

**🌙 Moon**  
The quality has been enhanced for every phase of the Moon, making it look much more realistic now.  
![Moon](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_ea2a9a39-df6c-44f8-a1ed-98afb9005bbe.png)

**☀ Sun**  
The Sun was shown as it is in our world, which increased its realism.  
![Sun](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_fd41da30-6a63-4c9b-88cf-5dc9b6a6e7fc.png)

**❄ Snowflakes**  
The snowflakes were made highly diverse and detailed, thereby enhancing the overall quality.  
![Snowflakes](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_221077b4-4946-490d-b90f-65aaed451bb0.png)

</details>
